mapper.select: SELECT cl.create_time AS check_time, cl.match_rate, cl.arrived_rate, cl.paid_rate FROM invest_fund_check_log cl WHERE cl.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY cl.create_time ASC

SELECT fpi.source_id, COALESCE(s.source_name, '未知来源') AS source_name, s.source_type, fpi.planned_amount, fpi.arrived_amount, fpi.paid_amount, CASE WHEN fpi.planned_amount > 0 THEN ROUND((fpi.arrived_amount / fpi.planned_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS source_arrived_rate FROM invest_fund_plan_item fpi LEFT JOIN invest_fund_source s ON fpi.source_id = s.source_id WHERE fpi.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY fpi.order_num
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invest_fund_plan WHERE del_flag = '0'
SELECT ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(match_rate, 0)), 2) FROM invest_fund_plan WHERE del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invest_fund_plan WHERE del_flag = '0' AND match_rate < #{threshold}
SELECT ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(arrived_total / NULLIF(budget_amount, 0) * 100, 0)), 2) FROM invest_fund_plan WHERE del_flag = '0' AND budget_amount > 0
